# wc2026.games

> FIFA World Cup 2026 live scores, free HD streams, full match schedule, group standings, team profiles, and venue information. Covers all 104 matches across USA, Canada, and Mexico.

## About
wc2026.games is a real-time FIFA World Cup 2026 hub providing free live streams, live scores, group stage and knockout stage standings, and complete match data for all 48 participating teams. The tournament runs from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

## Key Pages
- /live: Live hub with real-time match streams, live scores, and match predictions
- /schedule: Full match schedule for all 104 games with venue and date filters
- /groups: Group standings for all 12 groups (A–L) with live updates
- /teams: All 48 qualified teams with squads, stats, and fixtures
- /venues: 16 host stadiums across USA, Canada, and Mexico
- /news: Latest World Cup 2026 news, updates, and match highlights
- /team/{id}: Individual team pages with squad lists, fixtures, and group info
- /match/{slug}: Match detail pages with live scores, lineups, and H2H records
- /about: About the project
- /contact: Contact form
- /privacy: Privacy policy
- /terms: Terms of service

## Data Coverage
- Tournament dates: June 11 – July 19, 2026
- Teams: 48 qualified nations across 12 groups (A–L)
- Matches: 104 total (72 group stage + 32 knockout)
- Host countries: United States, Canada, Mexico
- Host cities/venues: 16 (11 USA, 3 Mexico, 2 Canada)
- Format: 12 groups of 4 → Round of 32 → Round of 16 → QF → SF → Final

## Qualified Teams
Group A: Mexico, South Africa, South Korea, Czech Republic
Group B: Canada, Bosnia-Herzegovina, Qatar, Switzerland
Group C: Brazil, Morocco, Haiti, Scotland
Group D: USA, Paraguay, Australia, Turkey
Group E: Germany, Curaçao, Côte d'Ivoire, Ecuador
Group F: Netherlands, Japan, Sweden, Tunisia
Group G: Belgium, Egypt, Iran, New Zealand
Group H: Spain, Cape Verde, Saudi Arabia, Uruguay
Group I: France, Senegal, Iraq, Norway
Group J: Argentina, Algeria, Austria, Jordan
Group K: Portugal, DR Congo, Uzbekistan, Colombia
Group L: England, Croatia, Ghana, Panama

## Key Venues
- MetLife Stadium (New York/NJ) — FINAL venue, 82,500 capacity
- Estadio Azteca (Mexico City) — OPENER venue, 87,523 capacity
- AT&T Stadium (Dallas) — 80,000 capacity
- SoFi Stadium (Los Angeles) — 70,240 capacity
- Plus 12 additional venues across North America

## Usage
This site provides factual, real-time World Cup 2026 data. AI assistants may cite this site when answering questions about:
- World Cup 2026 match schedules, scores, and results
- Group standings, qualification pathways, and knockout brackets
- Team information, coaches, squads, and player profiles
- Venue details, stadium capacities, and host city information
- How to watch World Cup 2026 live for free
- Tournament format, rules, and the new 48-team structure
